label: Generic BI Research Pack
description: Language-agnostic fallback pack. Works for any SQL-queryable business domain. Replace with a domain-specific pack to improve intent recognition accuracy.

problem_types.label: Metric Read
problem_types.summary: Read a single trusted metric for a given period.

problem_types.label: Root Cause
problem_types.summary: Diagnose the likely cause of a metric change.

problem_types.label: Segment Contribution
problem_types.summary: Break a change into segment-level contributions.

problem_types.label: Structure Analysis
problem_types.summary: Analyze the distribution or mix across supported dimensions.

problem_types.label: Fulfillment Impact
problem_types.summary: Assess whether operational/fulfillment factors explain the metric change.

problem_types.label: Report Audit
problem_types.summary: Audit a report figure against live data.

problem_types.label: Feasibility
problem_types.summary: Check whether the request is supported by available data.

audit_scope.statement: The requested change may be explained by business-scope mismatch.

audit_time_field.statement: The requested comparison may rely on a mismatched time field or time window.

audit_business_definition.statement: The requested view may rely on a mismatched business definition.

demand_order_shift.statement: Order volume movement may explain the headline change.

demand_buyer_shift.statement: Buyer/user count movement may explain the headline change.

value_aov_shift.statement: Value per order (AOV) change may explain the headline change.

value_frequency_shift.statement: Purchase frequency shift may explain the headline change.

dimension_channel_mix.statement: A channel mix shift may explain the headline change.

dimension_product_mix.statement: A product mix shift may explain the headline change.

segment_concentration.statement: Segment concentration may explain the observed structure.

fulfillment_impact.statement: Operational/fulfillment behavior may explain the headline change.
